heading: Omitted
label: 151 to 151f Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 151 to 151f which related to a National Advisory Committee for Aeronautics were omitted pursuant to , title III, , , formerly set out as a note under former , The Public Health and Welfare, which terminated the Committee and transferred all its functions, powers, duties, and obligations to the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.section 301(a) of Pub. L. 85–56872 Stat. 432section 2472 of Title 42July 29, 1958Section 151, acts , ; , ; , ; 1940 Reorg. Plan No. IV, § 7, eff. , 5 F.R. 2421, ; , title II, § 205(a), ; , ; , ; , ; , , established National Advisory Committee for Aeronautics, provided for its composition, prescribed compensation of members and duties of Committee, and required reports to Congress.Mar. 3, 1915, ch. 8338 Stat. 930Mar. 2, 1929, ch. 48245 Stat. 1451June 23, 1938, ch. 601, § 1107(e)52 Stat. 102754 Stat. 1235July 26, 1947, ch. 34361 Stat. 501May 25, 1948, ch. 335, § 162 Stat. 266Aug. 10, 1949, ch. 412, § 12(a)63 Stat. 591Aug. 8, 1950, ch. 645, § 464 Stat. 419June 3, 1954, ch. 25468 Stat. 170June 30, 1940Section 151a, , , was incorporated in .act Mar. 2, 1929, ch. 48245 Stat. 1451section 151 of this titleSection 151b, , , related to functions of Committee.act Aug. 8, 1950, ch. 645, § 164 Stat. 418Section 151c, , , related to transfer of supplies to Committee.act Aug. 8, 1950, ch. 645, § 264 Stat. 418Section 151d, , , related to employment of aliens.act Aug. 8, 1950, ch. 645, § 364 Stat. 418Section 151e, , , related to availability of appropriations.act Aug. 8, 1950, ch. 645, § 664 Stat. 419Section 151f, , , related to prosecution of projects.act Aug. 8, 1950, ch. 645, § 764 Stat. 419
